name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Fillable cover page for the Common Paper Mutual NDA. Contains fields for purpose, effective date, MNDA term, confidentiality period, governing law, jurisdiction, modifications, and party signatures.

name: Mutual NDA Standard Terms
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement, covering confidential information definitions, use and protection obligations, exceptions, required disclosures, term, termination, return of information, proprietary rights, disclaimer, governing law, and equitable relief.

name: Mutual NDA README
description: Overview and FAQ for the Common Paper Mutual NDA: creation process, versioning policy, usage instructions, and license information.

name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement, governing the provision and use of cloud-based software services between vendors and customers.

name: Cloud Service Agreement README
description: Overview and FAQ for the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement.

name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Service Level Agreement, defining service availability commitments, measurement methods, and remedies for service failures.

name: Service Level Agreement README
description: Overview and FAQ for the Common Paper Service Level Agreement.

name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Data Processing Agreement, covering personal data handling obligations, processor requirements, subprocessors, security measures, and data subject rights.

name: Data Processing Agreement README
description: Overview and FAQ for the Common Paper Data Processing Agreement.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Standard agreement for design partnerships, governing early-access product testing arrangements between vendors and design partners in exchange for feedback.

name: Design Partner Agreement README
description: Overview and FAQ for the Common Paper Design Partner Agreement.

name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Professional Services Agreement, governing the delivery of professional or consulting services including statements of work, fees, intellectual property, and warranties.

name: Professional Services Agreement README
description: Overview and FAQ for the Common Paper Professional Services Agreement.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Partnership Agreement, governing business partnership arrangements including roles, revenue sharing, intellectual property, and term.

name: Partnership Agreement README
description: Overview and FAQ for the Common Paper Partnership Agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Business Associate Agreement, governing the handling of protected health information (PHI) under HIPAA between covered entities and business associates.

name: Business Associate Agreement README
description: Overview and FAQ for the Common Paper Business Associate Agreement.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Software License Agreement, governing the licensing of software to end users including scope of license, restrictions, fees, and warranties.

name: Software License Agreement README
description: Overview and FAQ for the Common Paper Software License Agreement.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Pilot Agreement, governing short-term trial or evaluation arrangements that allow prospective customers to test a product or service before committing to a full commercial contract.

name: Pilot Agreement README
description: Overview and FAQ for the Common Paper Pilot Agreement.

name: AI Addendum
description: Standard addendum for AI-specific provisions, covering data use, model training restrictions, output ownership, and AI-related liability to supplement existing agreements.

name: AI Addendum README
description: Overview and FAQ for the Common Paper AI Addendum.
